queries.question: Show me what type of reporting each journalist specialises in
queries.sql: SELECT Assignments.title  from Article_Publication join Assignments on Article_Publication.assignment_id = Assignments.assignment_id join Freelance_Journalists on Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id = Freelance_Journalists.journalist_id   GROUP BY Article_Publication.assignment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Freelance_Journalists)

queries.question: Show me what type of reporting each journalist specialises in
queries.sql: select freelance_journalists.name , assignments.title from Article_Publication join Assignments on Article_Publication.assignment_id = Assignments.assignment_id join Freelance_Journalists on Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id = Freelance_Journalists.journalist_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?article_publication a :Article_Publication .
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?article_publication p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?freelance_journalists a :Freelance_Journalists .
  ?article_publication p:hasFreelance_Journalists ?freelance_journalists .
  ?freelance_journalists p:name ?name .
  ?assignments p:title ?title .
}

queries.question: Give me the titles and deadlines of the assignments that all the freelance journalists have.
queries.sql: SELECT Assignments.title, Assignments.deadline  from Article_Publication join Assignments on Article_Publication.assignment_id = Assignments.assignment_id join Freelance_Journalists on Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id = Freelance_Journalists.journalist_id   GROUP BY Article_Publication.assignment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Freelance_Journalists)

queries.question: Give me the titles and deadlines of the assignments that all the freelance journalists have.
queries.sql: select freelance_journalists.name , assignments.title , assignments.deadline from Article_Publication join Assignments on Article_Publication.assignment_id = Assignments.assignment_id join Freelance_Journalists on Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id = Freelance_Journalists.journalist_id

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?article_publication a :Article_Publication .

  ?freelance_journalists p:name ?name .
  ?assignments p:title ?title .

}

queries.question: What deadline of assignments is associated with each freelance journalist?
queries.sql: SELECT Assignments.deadline  from Article_Publication join Assignments on Article_Publication.assignment_id = Assignments.assignment_id join Freelance_Journalists on Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id = Freelance_Journalists.journalist_id   GROUP BY Article_Publication.assignment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Article_Publication.freelance_journalist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Freelance_Journalists)
